Event: Royal Challenge - Season 42
Event Date: 01/10/2025
Sage Bot Item Code: RI236
Whirlwind of the Seas Ring

Once in a while the unit covers 3 nearby enemies in jelly and acid for 5 sec. Enemies in jelly can't attack or move, and they take 40% more damage for the duration. When the ability wears off, the jelly explodes and sticks to 2 nearby enemies for 4 sec. Their attack speed is reduced by 30%, and they have a 50% chance to miss their target when attacking. Also, enemies in acid takes 875000 magic damage for 4 sec. The acid corrodes their armor, reducing it by 15% per second for 3 sec. When the armor reduction reaches 45%, the effect lasts for another 2 sec.

Requirements: 98-100

User rating: item not rated yet

First trigger: 3 sec

Cooldown: 8 secs
